---
title: "taxodist"
subtitle: "Taxonomic Distance and Phylogenetic Lineage Computation"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
        <meta name="description" content="taxodist is an R and Python package for computing taxonomic distances between any two taxa using The Taxonomicon database.">
---

```{=html}
<style>
  :root {
    --bg:      #faf6ee;
    --border:  #5c3d1e;
    --branch:  #8b5e3c;
    --tip:     #b8865a;
    --ink:     #3d2510;
    --muted:   #6b4c30;
    --rule:    #d9c9b0;
    --card-bg: #f3ede0;
    --code-bg: #ede5d0;
  }

  body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; background: var(--bg); color: var(--ink); }

  /* Nav */
  .site-nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 2rem;
    padding: 1rem 0 1rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
    margin-bottom: 3rem;
  }
  .nav-brand {
    font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.15rem;
    color: var(--ink);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .nav-brand:hover { color: var(--border); text-decoration: none; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .nav-links a {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.15s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--ink); text-decoration: none; }
  .nav-github { margin-left: auto; color: var(--border) !important; }
  .nav-toggle { display: none; background: none; border: none; font-size: 1.2rem; cursor: pointer; color: var(--ink); }
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .nav-toggle { display: block; margin-left: auto; }
    .nav-links { display: none; width: 100%; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 1rem 0; }
    .nav-links.open { display: flex; }
    .nav-github { margin-left: 0 !important; }
  }

  /* Hero */
  .hero {
    padding: 4rem 0 3rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
    margin-bottom: 3.5rem;
    max-width: 680px;
  }
  .hero h1 {
    font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
    color: var(--ink);
    margin: 0 0 0.4rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  }
  .hero-subtitle {
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-weight: 300;
    margin: 0 0 2rem;
    line-height: 1.7;
  }
  .hero-badges { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
  .hero-actions { display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }

  .btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0.55rem 1.2rem;
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.15s ease;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  }
  .btn-primary { background: var(--border); color: #faf6ee; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--ink); border-color: var(--ink); color: #faf6ee; text-decoration: none; }
  .btn-outline { background: transparent; color: var(--border); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .btn-outline:hover { background: var(--border); color: #faf6ee; text-decoration: none; }

  /* Formula */
  .formula-strip {
    background: var(--card-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--rule);
    border-left: 3px solid var(--branch);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 2rem 2.5rem;
    margin: 3rem 0;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
    gap: 2rem;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .formula-strip h3 {
    font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    margin: 0 0 0.6rem;
    color: var(--ink);
  }
  .formula-strip p { margin: 0; color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.65; }
  .formula-math {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    color: var(--border);
    white-space: nowrap;
    background: var(--code-bg);
    padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem;
    border-radius: 3px;
  }

  /* Section headings */
  .section-label {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--branch);
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.5vw, 2rem);
    color: var(--ink);
    margin: 0 0 2rem;
    font-weight: 400;
  }

  /* Cards */
  .cards {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 3.5rem;
  }
  .card {
    background: var(--card-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--rule);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 1.5rem;
  }
  .card h4 {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--ink);
    margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }
  .card p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--muted); margin: 0; line-height: 1.6; }

  /* App callout */
  .app-callout {
    background: var(--card-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--rule);
    border-left: 3px solid var(--branch);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 2rem 2.5rem;
    margin: 3rem 0;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
    gap: 2rem;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .app-callout h3 {
    font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    color: var(--ink);
    margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
    font-weight: 400;
  }
  .app-callout p { color: var(--muted); margin: 0 0 0.75rem; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.6; }
  .lang-badges { display: flex; gap: 0.4rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .lang-badge {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
    border-radius: 2px;
    background: var(--code-bg);
    color: var(--muted);
    border: 1px solid var(--rule);
  }
  .btn-app {
    background: var(--branch);
    color: #faf6ee;
    border: none;
    padding: 0.65rem 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-weight: 500;
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    text-decoration: none;
    white-space: nowrap;
    transition: background 0.15s ease;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  }
  .btn-app:hover { background: var(--border); color: #faf6ee; text-decoration: none; }

  /* Function grid */
  .fn-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: 2rem;
    margin-bottom: 3.5rem;
  }
  .fn-group h4 {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--branch);
    margin: 0 0 0.75rem;
    padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
  }
  .fn-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; }
  .fn-list li {
    display: flex;
    align-items: baseline;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    padding: 0.3rem 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(217,201,176,0.5);
    font-size: 0.85rem;
  }
  .fn-list li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .fn-name { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--border); font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; }
  .fn-desc { color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.4; }

  /* Data strip */
  .data-strip {
    background: var(--card-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--rule);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 1.75rem 2.25rem;
    margin: 3rem 0;
  }
  .data-strip h4 {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--ink);
    margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  }
  .data-strip p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--muted); margin: 0 0 0.4rem; line-height: 1.65; }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .cards { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .fn-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .formula-strip { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .app-callout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
</style>

<!-- NAVBAR -->
<nav class="site-nav">
  <a href="index.html" class="nav-brand">taxodist</a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="articles/getting-started.html">Get Started</a>
    <a href="articles/statistical-applications.html">Statistical Applications</a>
    <a href="reference.html">Reference</a>
    <a href="https://github.com/rodrigosqrt3/taxodist" class="nav-github">GitHub ↗</a>
  </div>
  <button class="nav-toggle" onclick="document.querySelector('.nav-links').classList.toggle('open')">☰</button>
</nav>

<div class="hero">
  <h1>taxodist</h1>
  <p class="hero-subtitle">
    An R and Python package for computing phylogenetic distances between any two taxa.
    Given two taxon names, taxodist retrieves their full hierarchical lineages from
    The Taxonomicon and computes a dissimilarity index based on the depth of their
    most recent common ancestor.
  </p>
  <div class="hero-badges">
    <a href="https://cran.r-project.org/package=taxodist">
      <img src="https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/taxodist" alt="CRAN status">
    </a>
    <a href="https://pypi.org/project/taxodist/">
      <img src="https://badge.fury.io/py/taxodist.svg" alt="PyPI version">
    </a>
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/license-GPL--3-blue" alt="License: GPL-3">
  </div>
  <div class="hero-actions">
    <a href="articles/getting-started.html" class="btn btn-primary">Get started</a>
    <a href="reference.html" class="btn btn-outline">Reference</a>
    <a href="https://github.com/rodrigosqrt3/taxodist" class="btn btn-outline">GitHub</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="formula-strip">
  <div>
    <h3>Distance metric</h3>
    <p>
      The distance between taxa A and B is the reciprocal of the depth of their
      most recent common ancestor (MRCA) in The Taxonomicon hierarchy.
      The deeper the shared ancestor, the smaller the distance.
      Taxa diverging at the same node are always equidistant from any third taxon,
      regardless of lineage depth below the split.
    </p>
  </div>
  <div class="formula-math">d(A,B) = 1 / depth(MRCA)</div>
</div>

<p class="section-label">Overview</p>
<h2 class="section-title">Core functionality</h2>

<div class="cards">
  <div class="card">
    <h4>Lineage resolution</h4>
    <p>Lineage data from The Taxonomicon (Systema Naturae 2000), with substantially deeper hierarchical resolution than most programmatic sources — up to 70 nodes for well-studied clades.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <h4>Distance computation</h4>
    <p>Pairwise distances between any two taxa, or a full symmetric distance matrix for a set. Returns standard <code>dist</code> objects compatible with the R and Python ecosystems.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <h4>Multivariate analysis</h4>
    <p>Wrapper functions for hierarchical clustering, PCoA ordination, and heatmap visualisation. Compatible with <code>vegan</code> and <code>ape</code> in R, and <code>scipy</code> in Python.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <h4>Lineage utilities</h4>
    <p>Retrieve full lineages, identify MRCAs, trace taxonomic paths, test clade membership, and filter lists of taxa by clade.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <h4>Session caching</h4>
    <p>Lineages are cached in memory after first retrieval. The cache can be serialised to disk and restored in future sessions, avoiding repeated network requests on large datasets.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <h4>R and Python</h4>
    <p>The API is equivalent across both languages, supporting consistent workflows in multi-language environments. Available on CRAN and PyPI.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="app-callout">
  <div>
    <h3>Interactive web application</h3>
    <p>
      A Shiny web application providing access to the main package functions through
      an interactive interface — pairwise distances, distance matrices, lineage explorer,
      closest-relative ranking, coverage checking, and clade filtering.
    </p>
    <div class="lang-badges">
      <span class="lang-badge">English</span>
      <span class="lang-badge">Português</span>
      <span class="lang-badge">Español</span>
      <span class="lang-badge">Français</span>
      <span class="lang-badge">Deutsch</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <a href="https://3w6g1b-rodrigo-villa.shinyapps.io/taxodist_app/" class="btn-app" target="_blank">
    Launch app
  </a>
</div>
```

## Installation and basic usage

::: {.panel-tabset}

### R

```r
install.packages("taxodist")
library(taxodist)

# Pairwise distance
taxo_distance("Tyrannosaurus", "Velociraptor")
#> Distance : 0.01538   MRCA: Tyrannoraptora (depth 65)

taxo_distance("Tyrannosaurus", "Homo")
#> Distance : 0.02778   MRCA: Amniota (depth 36)

taxo_distance("Tyrannosaurus", "Quercus")
#> Distance : 0.25000   MRCA: discaria (depth 4)

# Distance matrix and clustering
taxa <- c("Tyrannosaurus", "Velociraptor", "Triceratops",
          "Homo sapiens", "Panthera leo", "Quercus robur")
mat <- distance_matrix(taxa)
cl  <- taxo_cluster(taxa)
plot(cl)
```

### Python

```python
pip install taxodist
import taxodist as td

# Pairwise distance
td.taxo_distance("Tyrannosaurus", "Velociraptor")
# distance: 0.01538   mrca: Tyrannoraptora (depth 65)

td.taxo_distance("Tyrannosaurus", "Homo")
# distance: 0.02778   mrca: Amniota (depth 36)

# Distance matrix and clustering
taxa = ["Tyrannosaurus", "Velociraptor", "Triceratops",
        "Homo sapiens", "Panthera leo", "Quercus robur"]
mat = td.distance_matrix(taxa)
cl  = td.taxo_cluster(taxa)
cl.plot()
```

:::

```{=html}
<p class="section-label" style="margin-top:3.5rem">Functions</p>
<h2 class="section-title">API reference</h2>

<div class="fn-grid">
  <div class="fn-group">
    <h4>Distance computation</h4>
    <ul class="fn-list">
      <li><span class="fn-name">taxo_distance()</span><span class="fn-desc">Pairwise distance between two taxa</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">distance_matrix()</span><span class="fn-desc">Full symmetric distance matrix for a set of taxa</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">focal_distances()</span><span class="fn-desc">Distances from one focal taxon to a community</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">closest_relative()</span><span class="fn-desc">Nearest taxon among a set of candidates</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">mrca()</span><span class="fn-desc">Most recent common ancestor of two taxa</span></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div class="fn-group">
    <h4>Lineage and exploration</h4>
    <ul class="fn-list">
      <li><span class="fn-name">get_lineage()</span><span class="fn-desc">Full lineage by taxon name</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">get_lineage_by_id()</span><span class="fn-desc">Full lineage by Taxonomicon numeric ID</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">get_taxonomicon_id()</span><span class="fn-desc">Resolve taxon name to numeric ID</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">taxo_search()</span><span class="fn-desc">Search Taxonomicon; handles homonyms</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">compare_lineages()</span><span class="fn-desc">Side-by-side lineage comparison at the MRCA</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">shared_clades()</span><span class="fn-desc">Shared lineage trunk between two taxa</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">taxo_path()</span><span class="fn-desc">Node-by-node path from taxon A to taxon B</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">lineage_depth()</span><span class="fn-desc">Number of nodes in a taxon's lineage</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">is_member()</span><span class="fn-desc">Test whether a taxon belongs to a clade</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">filter_clade()</span><span class="fn-desc">Retain only taxa belonging to a given clade</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">check_coverage()</span><span class="fn-desc">Verify which taxa are present in Taxonomicon</span></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div class="fn-group">
    <h4>Multivariate analysis</h4>
    <ul class="fn-list">
      <li><span class="fn-name">taxo_cluster()</span><span class="fn-desc">Hierarchical clustering (UPGMA)</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">taxo_ordinate()</span><span class="fn-desc">Principal coordinate analysis (PCoA)</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">taxo_heatmap()</span><span class="fn-desc">Distance heatmap with marginal dendrograms</span></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div class="fn-group">
    <h4>Cache management</h4>
    <ul class="fn-list">
      <li><span class="fn-name">clear_cache()</span><span class="fn-desc">Remove all entries from the session cache</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">save_cache()</span><span class="fn-desc">Serialise the cache to an .rds file</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">load_cache()</span><span class="fn-desc">Restore a previously saved cache from disk</span></li>
      <li><span class="fn-name">cache_info()</span><span class="fn-desc">Report cache contents and memory use</span></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>

<div style="margin-bottom: 3.5rem;">
  <a href="reference.html" class="btn btn-primary">Full reference</a>
</div>

<div class="data-strip">
  <h4>Data source and citation</h4>
  <p>
    All lineage data is sourced from <a href="http://taxonomicon.taxonomy.nl" style="color:var(--border)">The Taxonomicon</a>,
    based on <em>Systema Naturae 2000</em> (Brands, S.J., 1989 onwards).
    Please cite this resource in any published work that uses taxodist.
  </p>
  <p>
    Brands, S.J. (1989 onwards). <em>Systema Naturae 2000</em>. Amsterdam, The Netherlands.
    Retrieved from The Taxonomicon, <a href="http://taxonomicon.taxonomy.nl" style="color:var(--border)">http://taxonomicon.taxonomy.nl</a>.
  </p>
</div>
```
